qd-1Open a tight or new jar.0..1choiceOptions: 5 options
qd-2Do heavy household chores (e.g., wash walls, wash floors).0..1choiceOptions: 5 options

qd-4Wash your back.0..1choiceOptions: 5 options
qd-5Use a knife to cut food.0..1choiceOptions: 5 options
qd-6Recreational activities in which you take some force or impact through your arm, shoulder, or hand (e.g., golf, hammering, tennis, etc.).0..1choiceOptions: 5 options
qd-7During the past week, to what extent has your arm, shoulder, or hand problem interfered with your normal social activities with family, friends, neighbors, or groups?0..1choiceOptions: 5 options
qd-8During the past week, were you limited in your work or other regular daily activities as a result of your arm, shoulder, or hand problem?0..1choiceOptions: 5 options
qd-9Arm, shoulder, or hand pain0..1choiceOptions: 5 options
qd-10Tingling (pins and needles) in your arm, shoulder, or hand0..1choiceOptions: 5 options
qd-11During the past week, how much difficulty have you had sleeping because of the pain in your arm, shoulder, or hand?0..1choiceOptions: 5 options
scoreQuickDASH Score0..1decimal

item.text: Open a tight or new jar.
Do heavy household chores (e.g., wash walls, wash floors).
Carry a shopping bag or briefcase.
Use a knife to cut food.
Recreational activities in which you take some force or impact through your arm, shoulder, or hand (e.g., golf, hammering, tennis, etc.).
During the past week, to what extent has your arm, shoulder, or hand problem interfered with your normal social activities with family, friends, neighbors, or groups?
During the past week, were you limited in your work or other regular daily activities as a result of your arm, shoulder, or hand problem?
Tingling (pins and needles) in your arm, shoulder, or hand
During the past week, how much difficulty have you had sleeping because of the pain in your arm, shoulder, or hand?
